# claudeadmin_compliance_chats (Data Source)

Lists Claude chats (`/v1/compliance/apps/chats`) for eDiscovery, DLP scans, and audit. Enterprise + Compliance Access Key with scope `read:compliance_user_data`. All filters optional — narrow by `user_id` + time window for busy orgs. Provider paginates until exhausted; the full result set materializes in state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Enterprise + Compliance Access Key with scope read:compliance_user_data.
# CAUTION: chat metadata + counts land in Terraform state.

data "claudeadmin_compliance_chats" "user_alice_last_month" {
  user_id     = "user_01ABC..."
  starting_at = "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z"
  ending_at   = "2026-07-01T00:00:00Z"
}

output "alice_recent_chats" {
  value = [
    for c in data.claudeadmin_compliance_chats.user_alice_last_month.chats : {
      id       = c.id
      title    = c.title
      messages = c.message_count
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ending_at` (String) RFC3339 upper bound (exclusive) on `created_at`.
- `limit` (Number) Per-page size (default 100).
- `starting_at` (String) RFC3339 lower bound (inclusive) on `created_at`.
- `user_id` (String) Filter by owning user_id.

### Read-Only

- `chats` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--chats))

<a id="nestedatt--chats"></a>
### Nested Schema for `chats`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `message_count` (Number)
- `project_id` (String)
- `title` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
